I continuously get 2 messages when I start the car: "Rear Cross Traffic Alert Not Available" and "ParkAssist not available".  The biggest problem is that when this happens, the rear camera does not work while in reverse. This has caused several near accidents for me. I took it ba

narrative.headline: What 2021 Porsche Taycan owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 69 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (54% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
